# kbdev.run — Technical Specification & Deep Dive

> Detailed breakdown of architecture, tech stack, and project structures for LLMs.

## Developer Profile
- **Name:** Kamil B. (Klubuntu)
- **Age:** 20
- **Role:** Frontend / Full-Stack Developer
- **Primary Stack:** JavaScript (React, Next.js 16.1.5), TypeScript, Tailwind CSS v4, HTML, CSS
- **Secondary Stack:** Rust, Python, PHP
- **Portfolio URL:** https://kbdev.run
- **Build Tool:** Turbopack

## Architecture & Routing

### Framework
- Next.js 16.1.5 App Router with static site generation (SSG)
- All routes are pre-rendered at build time (`○ (Static)` in build output)

### Multi-Language System (Custom i18n)
The portfolio uses a custom React Context-based i18n system (no external libraries):
- Translation files: `json/lang/pl_PL.json` and `json/lang/en_US.json`
- Language detection: reads `window.location.pathname` on load
  - `/` → Polish (pl_PL)
  - `/en` → English (en_US)
- Language switching: `window.history.replaceState()` — updates URL without page reload
- Persistence: `localStorage` (used only for non-root routes as fallback)
- Dynamic `html lang` attribute updated via `useEffect`

### Complete Route Tree (33 static routes)
```
/                            PL Home (3 featured projects + About + Collaboration + Support)
/noanim                      PL Home without animations
/archive                     PL Archived projects (8 projects)
/project/bacar                 PL Case study: Ba-Car
/project/chestdrop             PL Case study: Chestdrop
/project/clouds-network        PL Case study: Clouds Network
/project/countdown-web         PL Case study: Countdown Web
/project/itvt                  PL Case study: iTVT
/project/klubuntu              PL Case study: Klubuntu | Two Sides
/project/mvlist                PL Case study: MVList
/project/odliczamydo           PL Case study: Odliczamydo.pl
/project/onemylist             PL Case study: OneMyList
/project/oneros                PL Case study: OnerOS Web
/project/powrot-roxmb          PL Case study: Powrót RoxMb
/project/reqqel-music          PL Case study: Reqqel.music
/en                            EN Home
/en/noanim                    EN Home without animations
/en/archive                    EN Archived projects
/en/project/bacar              EN Case study: Ba-Car
/en/project/chestdrop          EN Case study: Chestdrop
/en/project/clouds-network     EN Case study: Clouds Network
/en/project/countdown-web      EN Case study: Countdown Web
/en/project/itvt               EN Case study: iTVT
/en/project/klubuntu           EN Case study: Klubuntu | Two Sides
/en/project/mvlist             EN Case study: MVList
/en/project/odliczamydo        EN Case study: Odliczamydo.pl
/en/project/onemylist          EN Case study: OneMyList
/en/project/oneros             EN Case study: OnerOS Web
/en/project/powrot-roxmb       EN Case study: Powrót RoxMb
/en/project/reqqel-music       EN Case study: Reqqel.music
/sitemap.xml                   Sitemap
```

## Component Architecture

### Layout (`app/layout.tsx`)
- Root server component
- Fonts: Geist, Geist Mono (Google Fonts)
- Wraps children in `Providers` (LanguageContext)
- IE 11-12 polyfills (inline)

### Page Components
- `HomePageContent.tsx` — Main page layout shared between `/` and `/en`
- `ArchiveContent.tsx` — Archived project listing shared between `/archive` and `/en/archive`
- `CaseStudyContent.tsx` — Generic case study component, takes `slug` prop, renders challenges/achievements from translations
- `CaseStudyBaCar.tsx` — Thin wrapper (legacy, delegates to CaseStudyContent)

### Navigation (`NavMenu.jsx`)
- Desktop: horizontal pill nav with spring-animated sliding indicator
- Mobile: hamburger menu with dropdown overlay
- Items: O mnie / About Me, Projekty / Projects, Współpraca / Collaboration, Wsparcie / Support
- On subpages, missing sections navigate to main page with hash (`/#section`)

### Language Switcher
- PL/EN flag buttons in header
- 700ms cooldown to prevent spam
- Updates body opacity (150ms fade) on switch
- `history.replaceState` for URL update — no page reload

### Project Card (`ProjectCard.jsx`)
- Horizontal card with project icon, name, stack tags, and action buttons
- Icons: project-specific SVGs (car, TV, disc, cloud, music note, clock, notepad, gamepad, wheel, countdown)
- Stack tags: color-coded badges (HTML, CSS, JS, TypeScript, React, Astro, Vue, PHP, Python, Rust)
- Name is clickable — navigates to case study page if available
- Website/GitHub buttons open external links
- Buttons are full-width centered on mobile

### Scroll Reveal (`AnimationUtils.jsx`)
- IntersectionObserver-based fade-in animations on scroll
- CSS class `revealed` triggers keyframe animations
- Fallback for older browsers

## Tech Stack Details

### Frontend
- **Framework:** Next.js 16.1.5 (App Router)
- **UI Library:** React 19.2.4
- **Language:** TypeScript + JavaScript
- **Styling:** Tailwind CSS v4 (PostCSS)
- **Icons:** Lucide React, inline SVGs
- **Fonts:** Geist (Google Fonts)

### Animations
- CSS keyframe animations (`animations.css`)
- ScrollReveal (IntersectionObserver)
- Parallax (scroll event)
- NavMenu spring physics (custom implementation)
- Hover animations (3D tilt)

### Build & Performance
- Turbopack bundler
- Static Site Generation (SSG) — all pages pre-rendered
- Next.js Image optimization (Gravatar avatar)

## Case Study Structure
Each case study page (`/project/{slug}`) follows the same template:
1. Title
2. Website/GitHub link buttons
3. Two-column grid (desktop) / stacked (mobile):
   - **Challenges** (target icon, red) — checkbox list of project challenges
   - **Achievements** (star icon, yellow) — checkbox list of results
4. Back link (returns to `/` for featured, `/archive` for archived)

Content sourced from translation JSON under `caseStudies.{slug}`.

## SEO & Internationalization
- All content translated to PL and EN
- `html lang` attribute set dynamically (pl/en)
- Clean URL structure with directory-based locale
- Static generation ensures <100ms TTFB
- All routes in `/sitemap.xml`
